name: Solider AutoChess
short_description: You will own all the kungfu in the world. "Solider AutoChess" is a cricket-fighting auto-chess game. Every battle is 1V1. You need to constantly upgrade and skillfully combine kungfus to reach the top.
detailed_description:
You will own all the kungfu in the world. "Solider AutoChess" is a cricket-fighting auto-chess game. Every battle is 1V1. You need to constantly upgrade and skillfully combine kungfus to reach the top.

There are currently more than a hundred kungfus and 3 modes for everyone to play.

I am very sorry that due to the adjustment of the discount, players who purchased this game before 12:00 on December 17, 2024, purchased this game at a higher price. I hope that these players can send the consumption records of this game to 32857431@qq.com. I will compensate you with a key for this game and a key for another game developed by me.
